title: Money finds me through expected and unexpected doors
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for opening to income from outside the plan.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 32 of the MONEY program. The release names the habit of expecting income only from known sources; the allow opens room for money to arrive in ways not yet planned.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 32 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you notice yourself mentally dismissing income that arrived from an unexpected place.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 32 of the MONEY program. The release names the habit of planning only familiar income routes; the allow opens room for income to arrive outside the plan.
I am ready to release the belief that income can only come from sources I have already planned. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow money to find me through expected and unexpected doors. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 32 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
